---
title: "GIS"
author: "Simon Gendrisch"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r, packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(units)
```


```{r, Load layers}
qfield <- st_read("./data/qfield_test_15.04.gpkg")
# QField points
qfield_wp <- st_read("./data/survey_data.gpkg", layer = "survey_data")

gaia <- st_read("./data/gaia_test_15.04.gpx", layer = "track_points")
gaia_line <- st_read("./data/gaia_test_15.04.gpx", layer = "tracks")

# Garmin track File
garmin <- st_read("./data/Garmin_test_14.04.gpx", layer = "track_points")
garmin_line <- st_read("./data/Garmin_test_14.04.gpx", layer = "tracks")

#Garmin POI File
garmin_wp <- st_read("./data/Waypoints_14-APR-26.gpx", layer = "waypoints")


bbox_1 <- st_bbox(garmin)
bbox_2 <- st_bbox(gaia)

```

```{r, cleaning qfield_wp for visualisation}

wp_clean <- qfield_wp %>%
  filter(species == "bottlenose_dolphin")


```


```{r, Plot test 1}

test_1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = qfield, aes(color = "QField"), linewidth = .8) +
  geom_sf(data = gaia_line, aes(color = "Gaia GPS"), linewidth = .8) +
  geom_sf(data = garmin_line, aes(color = "Garmin"), linewidth = .8) +
  geom_sf(data = garmin_wp, aes(color = "Garmin Waypoints"), size = 5) +
  geom_sf(data = wp_clean, aes(color = "QField Waypoints"), size = 5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("QField" = "blue", 
                               #  "Gaia GPS" = "red", 
                                 "Garmin" = "green",
                                 "Garmin Waypoints" = "darkgreen",
                                 "QField Waypoints" = "darkblue")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(bbox_1["xmin"], bbox_1["xmax"]), ylim = c(bbox_1["ymin"], bbox_1["ymax"]+.0003)) +
  labs(title = "GPS Track Comparison Test 1", color = "Source") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
  )



```

```{r, Plot test 2}

test_2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = qfield, aes(color = "QField"), linewidth = .8) +
  geom_sf(data = gaia_line, aes(color = "Gaia GPS"), linewidth = .8) +
  geom_sf(data = garmin_line, aes(color = "Garmin"), linewidth = .8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("QField" = "blue", 
                                 "Gaia GPS" = "red")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(bbox_2["xmin"], bbox_2["xmax"]), ylim = c(bbox_2["ymin"], bbox_2["ymax"]+.0003)) +
  labs(title = "GPS Track Comparison Test 2", color = "Source") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
  )

```

```{r, interactive plot}
leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addPolylines(data = st_transform(gaia_line, 4326),
               color = "red", weight = 2, label = "Gaia GPS") %>%
  addPolylines(data = st_transform(garmin_line, 4326),
               color = "green", weight = 2, label = "Garmin") %>%
  addPolylines(data = st_transform(qfield, 4326),
               color = "blue", weight = 2, label = "QField") %>% 
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",        # topleft, topright, bottomleft, bottomright
    colors   = c("red", "green", "blue"),
    labels   = c("Gaia GPS", "Garmin", "QField"),
    title    = "GPS Source",
    opacity  = 1
  )
```

```{r, Compare distance between points}

q_wp <- st_as_sfc(wp_clean)

g_wp <- st_as_sfc(garmin_wp)

st_distance(q_wp, g_wp)

```





```{r, Export}

ggsave(filename = "GPS_test_1.png", test_1, width = 1920, height = 1080, dpi = 200, units = "px")
ggsave(filename = "GPS_test_2.png", test_2, width = 1920, height = 1080, dpi = 200, units = "px")

```
